steps.title: Use the shortcoming clue
steps.content: The earlier research had a shortcoming: it focused too narrowly on North America and Western Europe because data were limited. Gaining access to records from Africa and Eastern Europe would make that problem less severe.

steps.title: Reject illogical verbs
steps.content:
• Choice A means assume beforehand, which does not fit fixing a shortcoming.
  • Choice B means classify, not reduce a problem.
  • Choice D means confirm, but the new data address the limitation rather than prove it correct.
The remaining choice means make less severe. The answer is C.
